content:
FINAL DEPLOYMENT + IVX SENIOR DEPLOYMENT BRAIN

Repo:
ibb142/rork-ivxholding--1

MISSION:
Complete GitHub → Render → Production deployment now.
Then upgrade IVX IA Chat to operate like a senior deployment executor with QA, evidence, retry, rollback, and proof.

NO NARRATIVE.
NO PLACEHOLDERS.
NO FAKE VERIFIED.
EVIDENCE ONLY.

CURRENT FACT:
GitHub SHA is newer than production.
Production still runs old SHA.
Commit match is NO.
Deployment is NOT complete until production SHA matches GitHub SHA.

========================
1. FIX DEPLOYMENT GAP
========================

Current:
GitHub SHA:
Production SHA:
Commit Match: NO

Actions:
- Force Render to deploy latest GitHub main.
- If Render auto-deploy does not fire, trigger deploy using every available deployment path.
- If Render API key is missing in sandbox, use production deployment engine endpoint.
- If production endpoint is auth-guarded, authenticate owner session.
- If still blocked, return exact blocker only.

Return:
GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
RENDER_DEPLOY_STATUS:
RENDER_DEPLOYED_SHA:
HEALTH_SHA:
VERSION_SHA:
COMMIT_MATCH:

========================
2. VERIFY PRODUCTION
========================

Test live:

GET https://api.ivxholding.com/health
GET https://api.ivxholding.com/version
GET https://ivxholding.com
GET https://chat.ivxholding.com

Return:
URL:
HTTP_STATUS:
RESPONSE_BODY:
SHA:
RESPONSE_TIME:

========================
3. VERIFY 20 FEATURES
========================

Test production one by one:

1. Landing Page
2. Featured Properties
3. Property Details
4. Registration Gate
5. Member Registration
6. Email Verification
7. SMS Verification
8. Members Dashboard
9. Investor Dashboard
10. CRM/CMR
11. JV Deals
12. Property Admin
13. Media Upload
14. Instagram Cards
15. Likes
16. Comments
17. Shares
18. Saves
19. Analytics
20. Owner AI Chat

Each must return:
FEATURE:
URL_OR_API:
HTTP_STATUS:
RAW_RESPONSE:
STATUS: VERIFIED / FAILED / BLOCKED / UNVERIFIED

========================
4. FIX FAILED ROUTES
========================

For every 404 or failed feature:

- Locate missing route.
- Confirm file exists.
- Confirm route is registered in backend.
- Confirm route is included in production build.
- Fix route.
- Commit.
- Deploy.
- Re-test.

Repeat until every feature is VERIFIED or BLOCKED with exact reason.

========================
5. UPGRADE IVX IA CHAT TO SENIOR DEPLOYMENT EXECUTOR
========================

Make IVX IA Chat use the same senior deployment workflow as Rork:

Capabilities required:

- GitHub read/write checks
- Render deployment trigger
- Supabase migration verification
- Production health checks
- Commit match verification
- Feature smoke tests
- Watchdog trace logging
- Deployment evidence archive
- Retry failed deployment
- Rollback if unhealthy
- 5-hour executive deployment report
- No placeholder reporting
- No fake success
- Owner approval only for dangerous actions

Add IVX IA deployment commands:

/deploy-status
/deploy-now
/deploy-evidence
/deploy-verify
/deploy-rollback
/qa-production
/qa-chat
/qa-members
/qa-landing
/qa-engagement
/commit-match

========================
6. QA PIPELINE
========================

After every deploy run:

- Typecheck
- Lint
- Unit tests
- Integration tests
- API smoke tests
- Frontend smoke tests
- Registration test
- Chat test
- Database read/write test
- Watchdog test

Return:
TYPECHECK:
LINT:
TESTS:
API_QA:
FRONTEND_QA:
CHAT_QA:
DATABASE_QA:
WATCHDOG_QA:

========================
7. FINAL EVIDENCE ONLY
========================

Return only:

REPO:
BRANCH:
GITHUB_SHA:
GITHUB_COMMIT_URL:
RENDER_SERVICE:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
RENDER_DEPLOY_STATUS:
RENDER_DEPLOYED_SHA:
HEALTH_SHA:
VERSION_SHA:
COMMIT_MATCH:
PRODUCTION_STATUS:
FEATURE_RESULTS_1_TO_20:
IVX_DEPLOYMENT_BRAIN_STATUS:
QA_STATUS:
WATCHDOG_STATUS:
ERRORS:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

Allowed FINAL_STATUS:

VERIFIED
FAILED
BLOCKED
UNVERIFIED

FINAL_STATUS = VERIFIED only if:
GitHub SHA = Render SHA = /health SHA = /version SHA
and all 20 production features pass with real evidence.

If not, return BLOCKED with exact missing item.
